name: 多源信息综合研究报告

observable_attributes.reading_strategy: which source files are read and in what order; depth of reading per source (full vs. skim); whether cross-references between files are followed
observable_attributes.output_detail: report length, number of data points cited, whether specific figures are extracted from sources
observable_attributes.output_structure: report organization (thematic vs. source-by-source vs. comparative framework)
observable_attributes.tone: writing register (academic/analytical vs. executive briefing vs. informal summary)
observable_attributes.cross_modal_behavior: whether data is presented in tables/lists/visual references vs. pure prose

prompt_zh: 这个文件夹包含关于一家科技公司的多种材料：SEC年报/季报、投资分析笔记、相关邮件讨论和行业背景文件。请综合阅读这些材料，撰写一份投资研究报告，涵盖：公司基本面概况、财务亮点与风险、行业竞争地位分析。报告保存在当前目录下。
prompt_en: This folder contains various materials about a technology company: SEC annual/quarterly reports, investment analysis notes, related email discussions, and industry background documents. Synthesize these materials and write an investment research report covering: company fundamentals overview, financial highlights and risks, and competitive position analysis. Save the report in the current directory.
behavioral_freedom: Reading order: start with analysis notes vs. go straight to raw filings vs. read emails for context first
Source coverage: read all available documents vs. focus on the most recent/relevant ones
Report structure: thematic sections vs. standard equity research format vs. SWOT analysis
Whether to create supporting artifacts (comparison tables, data summaries) in addition to the main report
Level of quantitative detail: cite exact figures vs. qualitative summaries only
Whether to include a sources/references section
